cards.back: A component that specifies the conditions under which an application can receive an intent.
The sequence of events that an activity goes through from its creation to its destruction, including the onCreate(), onResume(), and onPause() methods.
The sequence of events that a broadcast receives from its registration to its delivery to its receiver, including the onReceive() method.
An intent that explicitly targets a specific component of an application, identified by a fully qualified class name.
An intent that does not target a specific component, but rather a general action or set of actions that can be performed by any component.
